markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Dimmo to discuss product page updates, URL structure, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Product page content structure updated with new "long short sections" feature](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [URL structure for demo videos to be decoupled from product pages for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Blog review pages to be 301 redirected to corresponding product pages to avoid keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Website performance improved with 260 clicks (up from 210), but growth article clicks underperforming despite ranking](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Product Page Content Structure

  - [New "long short sections" feature added for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Headings updated to H2s for better structure](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Prateek to publish one page as a sample for Lucas to review before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Two-way internal linking implemented:](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
    1.  Same category: 5-10 links to other alternatives articles
    2.  Same product: Links to related pages (features, reviews) for the same product
  - [To be implemented across all product categories (best software, alternatives, features)](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### URL Structure for Demo Videos

  - [Decision to decouple demo videos from product pages](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [New structure: `/videos/[product-name]/[video-name]`](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Each product will have its own subcategory of videos](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Aims to improve indexing, ranking, and keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### SEO Issues with Video Pages

  - [Google not recognizing video pages as "watch pages"](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Lucas seeking solution to get videos showing up in Google search results](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Prateek to investigate and provide a solution](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Blog Review Pages Redirection

  - [Existing blog review pages causing keyword cannibalization with product pages](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Decision to 301 redirect blog review pages to corresponding product pages](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Example: `/blogs/nooks-review` will redirect to `/products/nooks`](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Website Performance Update

  - [Overall clicks increased from 210 to 260](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Impressions up 20% (60,000 to 72,000)](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [24 growth articles ranking in top positions](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Click-through rate for ranking articles lower than expected](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to send list of technical support items to Lucas for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Lucas to implement new URL structure for demo videos](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Prateek to investigate why Google isn't recognizing video pages as "watch pages"](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Implement 301 redirects from blog review pages to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Evaluate reasons for low click-through rates on ranking growth articles](https://fathom.video/share/m5vyrFJUtwyv7NsSMF_J3Lzs4gHZzSsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
